ticket_recommendations.title: A previous audit-to-repair cycle did not clear one or more workflow-layer findings before work resumed
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate CYCLE001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Before another repair run, compare the latest diagnosis pack against repair_history, identify which findings persisted, and treat repeated deprecated package-managed drift as a repair failure to fix rather than as preserved intent.
ticket_recommendations.repair_class: Scafforge package work required before the next subject-repo run
ticket_recommendations.summary: Before another repair run, compare the latest diagnosis pack against repair_history, identify which findings persisted, and treat repeated deprecated package-managed drift as a repair failure to fix rather than as preserved intent.

ticket_recommendations.title: Godot headless validation fails
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate EXEC-GODOT-004 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Run a deterministic `godot --headless --path . --quit` validation during audit and keep the repo blocked until it succeeds or returns an explicit environment blocker instead.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Run a deterministic `godot --headless --path . --quit` validation during audit and keep the repo blocked until it succeeds or returns an explicit environment blocker instead.

ticket_recommendations.title: Source imports reference missing local modules
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate REF-003 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Audit local relative import paths and fail when the referenced module file is missing.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Audit local relative import paths and fail when the referenced module file is missing.

ticket_recommendations.title: Fail-state routing is still under-specified in generated prompts or workflow skills
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate WFLOW024 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Document review, QA, smoke-test, and bootstrap failure recovery paths in ticket-execution, and instruct the team leader to follow transition_guidance.recovery_action whenever it is present.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Document review, QA, smoke-test, and bootstrap failure recovery paths in ticket-execution, and instruct the team leader to follow transition_guidance.recovery_action whenever it is present.

ticket_recommendations.title: One or more repo-local skills still contain generic placeholder text instead of project-specific guidance
ticket_recommendations.description: Remediate SKILL001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
ticket_recommendations.suggested_fix_approach: Populate every baseline local skill with concrete repo-specific rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler.
ticket_recommendations.summary: Populate every baseline local skill with concrete repo-specific rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler.
